title: Constraints
description: Constraint untuk menjaga integritas data di MySQL.

commands.name: PRIMARY KEY
commands.title: Primary Key
commands.description: Identifikasi unik untuk setiap baris dalam tabel.
commands.syntax: kolom tipe PRIMARY KEY / PRIMARY KEY (kolom1, kolom2)

commands.name: FOREIGN KEY
commands.title: Foreign Key
commands.description: Relasi antar tabel, menjaga referential integrity.
commands.syntax: FOREIGN KEY (kolom) REFERENCES tabel_ref(kolom_ref) [ON DELETE action] [ON UPDATE action]
commands.notes: CASCADE: hapus parent → hapus semua child. Hati-hati dengan cascading deletes!

commands.name: UNIQUE
commands.title: Unique Constraint
commands.description: Memastikan nilai kolom unik (tidak ada duplikat).
commands.syntax: kolom tipe UNIQUE / UNIQUE KEY (kolom1, kolom2)

commands.name: CHECK
commands.title: Check Constraint
commands.notes: CHECK constraint tersedia di MySQL 8.0.16+. Versi sebelumnya mengabaikan CHECK.

commands.name: NOT NULL-DEFAULT
commands.title: NOT NULL / DEFAULT
commands.description: Constraint untuk nilai wajib dan nilai default.
